cards.name: Under the White Hand
cards.quote: A shadow looms, and the banners of Saruman stir with dark promise.
cards.actionEffect: All allied units in radius 2 gain Strengthened <sprite name="strengthened"> (1 turn).

cards.name: Wormtongue's Whisper
cards.quote: In the ears of kings, whispers weave deceit like silken threads.
cards.actionEffect: All allied units in radius 2 gain Strengthened <sprite name="strengthened"> (1 turn).

cards.name: Furnaces of Isengard
cards.quote: The fires of industry roar, crafting weapons for the coming storm.
cards.actionEffect: If you are on a forest hex, gain +3 timber; beast- or Ent-race characters here are moderately wounded.

cards.name: Uruk Vanguard
cards.quote: March forth, Uruks! Let the banners fly in fierce honor!
cards.actionEffect: All allied armies in radius 2 gain Fortified <sprite name="fortified"> (1 turn).

cards.name: Dunlending Archers
cards.quote: With steady hands, they unleash arrows that sing of vengeance.

cards.name: Dunlending Warriors
cards.quote: Fierce and proud, they charge forth to reclaim their lost lands.

cards.name: Hillmen
cards.quote: From the heights they descend, swift as the autumn storms.

cards.name: Mines
cards.quote: Beneath the earth, the echoes of pick and hammer resound.

cards.name: Mounted Hillmen
cards.quote: Riders of the hills, they strike like thunder on the plains.

cards.name: Torch Bearers
cards.quote: Flickering flames lead the way through the encroaching darkness.

cards.name: Chopping the Trees
cards.quote: The axe bites deep; the forest's heart quakes at the sound.
cards.actionEffect: If you are on a forest hex, gain +3 timber; beast- or Ent-race characters here are moderately wounded.

cards.name: WhatDoesMordorCommand
cards.quote: From the depths of shadow, commands echo with cruel urgency.
cards.actionEffect: All allies in radius 1 gain Strengthened <sprite name="strengthened"> and Haste <sprite name="haste"> (1 turn).

cards.name: Caradhras
cards.quote: The mountain stirs, a chill creeping through the hearts of the unprepared.
cards.actionEffect: Environmental event. Freezes enemy units on mountain tiles in radius 5.

cards.name: Raid From The Mountains
cards.quote: The mountains whisper of swift vengeance; the raiders heed the call.
cards.actionEffect: All allied army commanders in mountains or hills gain Haste <sprite name="haste"> (1 turn) and Courage <sprite name="encouraged"> (1 turn).

cards.name: Bill Ferny
cards.quote: In shadows he lingers, a merchant of malice and deceit.
cards.actionEffect: Reveal the random enemy settlement for 1 turn(s).

cards.name: Grima
cards.quote: Words are my blade, cutting through the hearts of men.
cards.actionEffect: Decrease loyalty <sprite name="loyalty"> by 20 on a visible enemy settlement.

cards.name: Ugluk
cards.quote: To battle! The scent of blood drives us ever onward!
cards.actionEffect: Recruit 2 hi <sprite name="hi"> to a controlled army.

cards.name: The Undead King
cards.quote: I am the end of all who dwell in light; fear my coming.
cards.actionEffect: Conceal a random controlled settlement from enemies for 1 turn(s).

cards.name: Broccach
cards.quote: From the shadows I rise, a warrior of the forgotten hills.
cards.actionEffect: Grant 10 XP to all controlled armies.

cards.name: Waulfa
cards.quote: Strength of the earth flows through my veins; I will not falter.
cards.actionEffect: Recruit 2 lc <sprite name="lc"> to a controlled army.

cards.name: Mauhur
cards.quote: The hunt is on, and with it comes the thrill of the chase.
cards.actionEffect: Restore full movement <sprite name="movement"> to a random controlled character.

cards.name: Crebain
cards.quote: From the shadows they come, cawing like harbingers of doom.

cards.name: Bog Swarm
cards.quote: A foul mist rises from the marshes, cloaking the desolation.

cards.name: Engines from Isengard
cards.quote: Timber, iron, and fire answer Saruman's mind; the furnaces labour and the war-machine rolls.
cards.actionEffect: All allied armies in radius 2 gain +25 proc chance to trigger their army ability this turn.

cards.name: Storm from Orthanc
cards.quote: Saruman's word falls like iron from the tower, and the weary find themselves driven to one more deed.
cards.actionEffect: All friendly units in this hex can action again.

cards.name: Uncautious Supper
cards.quote: A flame unwatched at meal may summon the long eye of night.
cards.actionEffect: At supper or rest, Hobbits in radius 2 lose Hidden <sprite name="hidden"> and take 15 damage.

cards.name: Orc Draught
cards.quote: In the depths of despair, even the wicked find a flicker of strength.
cards.actionEffect: Target allied character in your hex: heal a small amount and gain Haste <sprite name="haste"> (1 turn).

cards.name: OrcRebellion
cards.quote: The chains of tyranny shall be shattered in the fires of revolt!
cards.actionEffect: Target allied army commander in your hex: gain +1 permanent Commander and lose 1 unit of the weakest army troop type.

cards.name: Sand Storm
cards.quote: A tempest of sand engulfs the land, blinding friend and foe alike.
cards.actionEffect: Environmental event. Halts all non-Southron units on desert tiles.

cards.name: ElvesGoingWest
cards.quote: The shores of the West beckon, but despair holds them fast.
cards.actionEffect: The sea-longing cannot be denied forever. Choose 1 Elf in radius 3; they are moved 1 hex westward, gain Despair <sprite name="despair">, and lose Hidden <sprite name="hidden"> and their action this turn.

cards.name: TheLureOfTheSenses
cards.quote: In the haze of battle, the senses deceive, and danger lurks unseen.
cards.actionEffect: Block target enemy character for 1 turn. If it is a Maia, block it for 3 turns.

cards.name: Cruel Winter
cards.quote: The bitter chill of winter descends, freezing the hearts of the unprepared.
cards.actionEffect: Environmental event. All mountain enemy units have 7.5% chance to become Frozen <sprite name="frozen">.

cards.name: Twilight
cards.quote: In twilight's embrace, shadows lengthen and secrets are revealed.
cards.actionEffect: Environmental event: in radius 2, reduce visibility and clear scouting; allied dark-aligned PCs there become temporarily hidden.

cards.name: ANewBreedOfWar
cards.quote: Iron will makes soldiers of the raw and fearful.
cards.actionEffect: Choose an allied army in your hex: convert 1 Men-at-arms <sprite name="ma"> into 1 Heavy Infantry <sprite name="hi">.

cards.name: Lurtz
cards.quote: I am the hunter, and you are my prey.
cards.actionEffect: Apply Strengthened <sprite name="strengthened"> (2 turns) to a random controlled character.

cards.name: Shagrat
cards.quote: The filth of the world clings to me, a badge of my mastery.
cards.actionEffect: Reveal hexes in radius 2 around all controlled characters.

cards.name: AmonLhaw
cards.quote: AmonLhaw watches the vale with a stillness that can outlast kingdoms.

cards.name: Caradhras
cards.quote: At Caradhras, the walls are stern, and the silence is the silence of deep craft.

cards.name: FangornSCamp
cards.quote: FangornSCamp sits at the edge of Fangorn like a hesitant footstep beside an ancient mind.

cards.name: AmonHen
cards.quote: AmonHen crowns the river with a stern eye, as if watching for the same doom that once came south.

cards.name: Angren
cards.quote: Angren carries the iron memory of the mountains, where work and warning have always stood together.

cards.name: Arailt
cards.quote: Arailt lies quiet beneath the hills, but the ground there still knows the tread of ancient feet.

cards.name: Enedhir
cards.quote: Enedhir holds the road with the stubborn silence of a place that has buried too many names.

cards.name: Treforn
cards.quote: Treforn holds to the land with a farmerÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã¢â€žÂ¢s patience and a watchmanÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã¢â€žÂ¢s eye.

cards.name: Khazad-Dum
cards.quote: Khazad-Dum endures in buried majesty, and the dark below it still rings with memory.

cards.name: TheShire
cards.quote: The Shire endures by patience and many watchful hands.

cards.name: Cardolan
cards.quote: Cardolan keeps old roads under the grass.

cards.name: Bree
cards.quote: Bree keeps faith with the road, though the years grow wary.

cards.name: AmonSul
cards.quote: Weathertop remembers moonlight, blade, and the long ache of old days.

cards.name: Sarn Ford
cards.quote: At Sarn Ford the river keeps the western gate.

cards.name: Hobbiton
cards.quote: The green of Hobbiton seems soft, yet it has a watchful heart.

cards.name: Nindalf
cards.quote: In the quiet valley, the river sings a timeless song.

cards.name: Uruk Hai
cards.quote: Steel-clad and relentless, we march as one unyielding force.

cards.name: Wolves
cards.quote: The howl of the pack heralds the hunt's beginning.

cards.name: Aonghas
cards.quote: The vale of shadows shall know my wrath.
cards.actionEffect: Reveal hexes in radius 2 around all controlled characters.

cards.name: Enion
cards.quote: In silence, I weave the fate of those who dare oppose me.
cards.actionEffect: Increase loyalty <sprite name="loyalty"> by 15 on a random controlled settlement.

cards.name: BrownLands
cards.quote: Once verdant, now a memory, these lands bear the scars of forgotten battles.

cards.name: The White Hand
cards.quote: A new power is rising. Its victory is at hand. The age of courtesy is ended — the age of the White Hand has begun.
cards.actionEffect: Recruit 3 hi <sprite name="hi"> to a controlled army.

cards.name: False Parley
cards.quote: Words can be as sharp as swords; choose them wisely.
cards.actionEffect: The two easternmost allied armies gain +1 <sprite name="hc"> and +1 <sprite name="lc">.

cards.name: Lured by Halflings' Leaf
cards.quote: The sweet scent of the Shire can ensnare even the mightiest of foes.
cards.actionEffect: Target enemy Maia in radius 2: Halted <sprite name="halted"> (1 turn) and Blocked <sprite name="blocked"> (2 turns).

cards.name: NewOrder
cards.quote: A fresh dawn breaks, heralding the reforge of our ambitions.
cards.actionEffect: Remove all your Gold. Add +5 Timber, +5 Iron, +5 Steel. Gain +2 Fortification at your capital.

cards.name: WildFire
cards.quote: The forest weeps as flames dance, a terrible beauty unleashed.
cards.actionEffect: Environmental event: apply Burning <sprite name="burning"> (1 turn) to all enemy units on forest tiles within radius 2.

cards.name: Sniped!
cards.quote: A swift arrow flies, carrying the promise of fear and pain.
cards.actionEffect: Target enemy in same/adjacent hex: inflict small wound and Fear <sprite name="fear"> (1 turn).

cards.name: Wargs
cards.quote: Speed and hunger drive them, a dark storm of fangs and fury.

cards.name: MistyMountains
cards.quote: The Misty Mountains hold their teeth against all who pass.

cards.name: GapOfRohan
cards.quote: A narrow pass where courage meets the mountains' might.

cards.name: Dunland
cards.quote: The rugged hills of Dunland echo with the whispers of ancient battles long forgotten.

cards.name: Arthedain
cards.quote: Arthedain remembers its kings in the wind.

cards.name: Half Orcs
cards.quote: Born of shadow, they revel in chaos and bloodshed.

cards.name: Mounted Half-Orcs
cards.quote: With the speed of a wild storm, they charge into battle.

cards.name: Ring of Orthanc
cards.quote: The ring upon the White Hand weighs heavier than iron, and those who see it know the tower's will.
cards.actionEffect: The stone sings to those of Saruman’s order. Allied characters here heal 15 (25 on Orthanc); allied army commanders gain 1 Heavy Infantry <sprite name="hi"> (2 on Orthanc).

cards.name: Edoras
cards.quote: Edoras keeps its golden roofs against the sky, and the wind there still remembers riders.
